name: Trust Graph - Relationship Intelligence Platform
description: Production-grade relationship intelligence platform for founders. Track trust scores, get AI-powered call timing, and never miss a hot lead.

services.name: api
services.description: Main FastAPI backend with REST endpoints

NEO4J_URI.description: Neo4j connection URI (use neo4j+s:// or bolt+s:// for Aura)

NEO4J_PASSWORD.description: Neo4j password (set as a Railway secret)

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection URL (set as a Railway secret or service reference)

SLACK_APP_TOKEN.description: Slack app token for socket mode (optional)

services.name: redis
services.description: Redis for caching and task queue

info.readme:
# Trust Graph

Relationship intelligence platform for founders.

## Features

- **Trust Scoring**: Dynamic scores with velocity tracking
- **AI Timing Advisor**: Optimal call time recommendations
- **Multi-Portfolio**: Manage fundraising, sales, hiring separately
- **Slack Integration**: Daily briefings + outcome capture
- **ML Predictions**: Deal probability forecasting

## Quick Start

1. Deploy completes in ~2 minutes
2. Railway will provision Neo4j Aura automatically
3. Access your API at the generated Railway URL
4. View docs at: `https://your-app.up.railway.app/docs`

## Post-Deploy

1. **Add Neo4j Aura** (recommended):
   - Go to neo4j.com/aura
   - Create free tier instance
   - Update NEO4J_URI in Railway variables

2. **Initialize Database**:
   - The init service runs automatically on first deploy
   - Check logs to verify completion

3. **Optional Integrations**:
   - Set SLACK_BOT_TOKEN for Slack integration
   - Set EMAIL_ACCOUNT for email parsing

## Documentation

- API Docs: `/docs`
- Health Check: `/health`
- Full Guide: See repository README

## Support

Issues: https://github.com/yourusername/trust-graph/issues

postDeploy.message: 🎉 Trust Graph deployed! Initialize the database by checking the 'init' service logs. Then access your API at the provided URL.
